query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A photographic film strip runs horizontally across the frame, showing two adjacent exposures separated by a vertical divider. The strip has rows of rectangular perforations along its top and bottom edges. The left exposure shows trees and foliage surrounding a tall, pointed structure resembling a castle. The right exposure shows a person wearing a brimmed hat, viewed from behind, standing near a statue of a figure with one arm raised, with additional trees and figures visible in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A photographic film strip runs horizontally with heavy analog grain, noise, and textured surface visible throughout. The two adjacent frames show a landscape with trees and a castle-like spire on the left, and a person in a brimmed hat viewed from behind standing near a raised statue on the right. The image foregrounds the tactile, archival quality of analog film stock with prominent sprocket holes along the edges and organic imperfection across the emulsion.
